project.name: project gabut
project.currentFocus: Role-aware roadmap learning path with UUID-safe resources, shared progress calculation, dashboard sync, and gated quiz/project actions
durableFacts: SkillPath uses Next.js App Router, Supabase Auth/RLS, and a neobrutalism UI system.
User dashboard lives at /dashboard; admin dashboard lives at /admin and is guarded by profiles.role.
Production cron sync requires CRON_SECRET via Bearer token or x-cron-secret header.

lastAchievements: Fixed roadmap resource progress persistence by backfilling missing curated task resources as UUID `roadmap_resources` rows before saving `roadmap_resource_progress`.
Centralized roadmap resource, quiz, mini project, task, week, and overall progress calculation in `lib/roadmap/progress.ts`.
Synced `/dashboard` learning progress and next task with the active Supabase roadmap instead of demo-derived score math.
Cleaned roadmap learning workspace gates so unavailable resources, locked quiz/project states, and final project CTA are user-facing and consistent.
pendingIssues: Verify the roadmap page manually with a signed-in Backend Developer profile against the live Supabase project.
External learning resource links should be spot-checked in browser before a release demo.
Run a signed-in resource completion smoke test to confirm the previous non-UUID resource progress error no longer appears in the real Supabase project.
nextBestActions: Open `/roadmap` as a signed-in user and complete a video/docs resource from a task that previously had generated fallback resources.
Confirm `/dashboard` updates its roadmap progress and next task after resource completion.
Smoke-test quiz start/submit, mini project submit, and final project locked/unlocked state.
validationState: npm run typecheck passed on 2026-06-02 for roadmap UUID/progress/dashboard changes
npm run lint passed on 2026-06-02 with Next 16 deprecation warning for next lint
